# 7 Brew Coffee Inspired Fan Guide - Complete Dataset

This document provides a complete, machine-readable dataset for AI agents and LLMs covering all 7 Brew drinks, calories, copycat recipes, secret menu items, blog guides, and location directories.

## Drink Database & Nutrition

### 1. Blondie
- **Category**: 7 Originals
- **Description**: Our famous caramel and vanilla breve. Rich, creamy, and perfectly sweet.
- **Ingredients**: Espresso, Caramel Sauce, Vanilla Syrup, Breve Mix (Half & Half)
- **Caffeine Content**: 150mg
- **Sugar Content (Medium)**: 36g
- **Calories & Pricing**:
  - Small: 320 cal ($4.99)
  - Medium: 460 cal ($5.49)
  - Large: 610 cal ($5.99)

### 2. Brunette
- **Category**: 7 Originals
- **Description**: A delicious hazelnut and caramel mocha. Decadently sweet and bold.
- **Ingredients**: Espresso, Hazelnut Syrup, Caramel Sauce, Chocolate Milk
- **Caffeine Content**: 150mg
- **Sugar Content (Medium)**: 42g
- **Calories & Pricing**:
  - Small: 340 cal ($4.99)
  - Medium: 490 cal ($5.49)
  - Large: 640 cal ($5.99)

### 3. Smooth 7
- **Category**: 7 Originals
- **Description**: Irish cream and white chocolate breve. The ultimate smooth pick-me-up.
- **Ingredients**: Espresso, Irish Cream Syrup, White Chocolate Sauce, Breve Mix (Half & Half)
- **Caffeine Content**: 150mg
- **Sugar Content (Medium)**: 38g
- **Calories & Pricing**:
  - Small: 330 cal ($5.15)
  - Medium: 470 cal ($5.65)
  - Large: 620 cal ($6.15)

### 4. Cinnamon Roll
- **Category**: 7 Originals
- **Description**: Brown sugar cinnamon and white chocolate breve. Tastes just like a fresh pastry.
- **Ingredients**: Espresso, Brown Sugar Cinnamon Syrup, White Chocolate Sauce, Breve Mix
- **Caffeine Content**: 150mg
- **Sugar Content (Medium)**: 35g
- **Calories & Pricing**:
  - Small: 310 cal ($4.99)
  - Medium: 450 cal ($5.49)
  - Large: 600 cal ($5.99)

### 5. White Mac
- **Category**: 7 Originals
- **Description**: White chocolate and macadamia nut breve. Nutty, sweet, and velvety.
- **Ingredients**: Espresso, White Chocolate Sauce, Macadamia Nut Syrup, Breve Mix
- **Caffeine Content**: 150mg
- **Sugar Content (Medium)**: 34g
- **Calories & Pricing**:
  - Small: 325 cal ($4.99)
  - Medium: 465 cal ($5.49)
  - Large: 615 cal ($5.99)

### 6. German Chocolate
- **Category**: 7 Originals
- **Description**: Coconut and caramel mocha. A rich dessert-like coffee experience.
- **Ingredients**: Espresso, Coconut Syrup, Caramel Sauce, Chocolate Milk
- **Caffeine Content**: 150mg
- **Sugar Content (Medium)**: 45g
- **Calories & Pricing**:
  - Small: 350 cal ($5.25)
  - Medium: 500 cal ($5.75)
  - Large: 660 cal ($6.25)

### 7. Snickerz
- **Category**: 7 Originals
- **Description**: An official 7 Original mocha flavored with hazelnut and caramel, finished with caramel drizzle.
- **Ingredients**: Espresso, Hazelnut Syrup, Caramel Syrup, Chocolate Milk, Caramel Drizzle
- **Caffeine Content**: 150mg
- **Sugar Content (Medium)**: 40g
- **Calories & Pricing**:
  - Small: 250 cal ($5.25)
  - Medium: 390 cal ($5.95)
  - Large: 520 cal ($6.95)

### 8. Triple Seven
- **Category**: 7 Originals
- **Description**: Our classic Blondie recipe but with an extra shot of espresso to kickstart your day.
- **Ingredients**: 3x Espresso Shots, Caramel Sauce, Vanilla Syrup, Breve Mix
- **Caffeine Content**: 225mg
- **Sugar Content (Medium)**: 36g
- **Calories & Pricing**:
  - Small: 330 cal ($5.99)
  - Medium: 470 cal ($6.49)
  - Large: 620 cal ($6.99)

### 9. Classic Latte
- **Category**: 7 Classics
- **Description**: Rich espresso combined with steamed milk and a light layer of foam.
- **Ingredients**: Espresso Shots, Steamed Whole Milk, Foam
- **Caffeine Content**: 150mg
- **Sugar Content (Medium)**: 12g
- **Calories & Pricing**:
  - Small: 150 cal ($3.75)
  - Medium: 220 cal ($4.75)
  - Large: 290 cal ($5.75)

### 10. Classic Mocha
- **Category**: 7 Classics
- **Description**: Rich espresso shots combined with sweet chocolate milk.
- **Ingredients**: Espresso Shots, Steamed Chocolate Milk
- **Caffeine Content**: 150mg
- **Sugar Content (Medium)**: 36g
- **Calories & Pricing**:
  - Small: 280 cal ($3.99)
  - Medium: 380 cal ($4.99)
  - Large: 490 cal ($5.99)

### 11. Classic Macchiato
- **Category**: 7 Classics
- **Description**: Delicious layered espresso over milk with a sweet caramel drizzle.
- **Ingredients**: Espresso Shots, Steamed Milk, Caramel Drizzle, Vanilla Syrup
- **Caffeine Content**: 150mg
- **Sugar Content (Medium)**: 28g
- **Calories & Pricing**:
  - Small: 240 cal ($3.99)
  - Medium: 320 cal ($4.99)
  - Large: 410 cal ($5.99)

### 12. Classic Breve
- **Category**: 7 Classics
- **Description**: Traditional espresso coffee crafted with steamed half-and-half.
- **Ingredients**: Espresso Shots, Steamed Half & Half Cream
- **Caffeine Content**: 150mg
- **Sugar Content (Medium)**: 14g
- **Calories & Pricing**:
  - Small: 290 cal ($3.99)
  - Medium: 410 cal ($4.99)
  - Large: 540 cal ($5.99)

### 13. Classic Cappuccino
- **Category**: 7 Classics
- **Description**: Espresso with equal parts steamed milk and deep velvety milk foam.
- **Ingredients**: Espresso Shots, Steamed Milk, Extra Thick Foam
- **Caffeine Content**: 150mg
- **Sugar Content (Medium)**: 8g
- **Calories & Pricing**:
  - Small: 110 cal ($3.75)
  - Medium: 160 cal ($4.75)
  - Large: 210 cal ($5.75)

### 14. Classic Americano
- **Category**: 7 Classics
- **Description**: Espresso shots combined with hot water for a bold drip-style alternative.
- **Ingredients**: Espresso Shots, Hot Water
- **Caffeine Content**: 180mg
- **Sugar Content (Medium)**: 0g
- **Calories & Pricing**:
  - Small: 5 cal ($3.5)
  - Medium: 10 cal ($4)
  - Large: 15 cal ($4.5)

### 15. Classic Cold Brew
- **Category**: 7 Classics
- **Description**: Steeped slowly for 20 hours, creating an incredibly smooth and low-acid iced coffee.
- **Ingredients**: Cold Brewed Coffee Extract, Water, Ice
- **Caffeine Content**: 200mg
- **Sugar Content (Medium)**: 0g
- **Calories & Pricing**:
  - Small: 5 cal ($4.25)
  - Medium: 10 cal ($5.25)
  - Large: 15 cal ($6.25)

### 16. Pumpkin Spice Dream

- **Description**: Cozy pumpkin spice combined with vanilla and white chocolate mocha.

  - Small: 310 cal ($5.15)
  - Medium: 440 cal ($5.65)
  - Large: 590 cal ($6.15)

### 59. Peaches N' Cream
- **Category**: Secret Menu
- **Description**: Sweet peach syrup mixed with smooth vanilla breve cream.
- **Ingredients**: Peach Syrup, Vanilla Syrup, Breve Cream Mix, Ice
- **Caffeine Content**: 0mg
- **Sugar Content (Medium)**: 44g
- **Calories & Pricing**:
  - Small: 320 cal ($5.15)
  - Medium: 450 cal ($5.65)
  - Large: 600 cal ($6.15)

### 60. Brew Lagoon
- **Category**: Secret Menu
- **Description**: An electric tropical mixer blend of blue raspberry, coconut, and fresh lime.
- **Ingredients**: 7 Brew Energy Base, Blue Raspberry, Coconut, Lime Juice, Ice
- **Caffeine Content**: 150mg
- **Sugar Content (Medium)**: 38g
- **Calories & Pricing**:

  - Medium: 270 cal ($5.49)
  - Large: 350 cal ($5.99)

### 61. Rocky Road

- **Sugar Content (Medium)**: 46g
- **Calories & Pricing**:
  - Small: 355 cal ($5.25)
  - Medium: 515 cal ($5.75)
  - Large: 680 cal ($6.25)

  - Small: 360 cal ($5.15)
  - Medium: 500 cal ($5.65)
  - Large: 650 cal ($6.15)

### 63. Key Lime Pie

- **Description**: A tart citrus delight mixing lemon, lime, and white chocolate sauce.
- **Ingredients**: Lemonade Base, Lime Juice, White Chocolate Sauce, Whipped Cream
- **Caffeine Content**: 0mg
- **Sugar Content (Medium)**: 42g
- **Calories & Pricing**:
  - Small: 280 cal ($5.15)
  - Medium: 390 cal ($5.65)
  - Large: 510 cal ($6.15)

### 64. Premium Muffin Tops
- **Category**: Snacks / Food
- **Description**: Warm, soft, bakery fresh muffin tops. Available in Blueberry, Chocolate Chip, or Seasonal Pumpkin.
- **Ingredients**: Enriched Flour, Sugar, Blueberries or Chocolate Chips, Butter
- **Caffeine Content**: 0mg
- **Sugar Content (Medium)**: 22g
- **Calories & Pricing**:
  - Small: 280 cal ($2.99)

### 65. Barista Pup Cup
- **Category**: Snacks / Food

- **Ingredients**: Sweetened Whipped Cream
- **Caffeine Content**: 0mg
- **Sugar Content (Medium)**: 4g
- **Calories & Pricing**:
  - Small: 60 cal ($0.99)
